description: This file provides an API interface to manage notes, including functions for health check, listing, creating, updating, deleting notes, and handling tags and sync queue, with support for local storage and backend interactions.

methods.name: export function getAppMode(): AppMode { getAppMode
methods.description: Retrieves the persisted application mode ('local' or 'backend') from JSON storage.

methods.name: export function setAppMode(mode: AppMode): void { setAppMode
methods.description: Persists the specified application mode ('local' or 'backend') into JSON storage.

methods.name: export async function apiHealthCheck(mode: AppMode): Promise<{ ok: boolean; message?: string }> / apiHealthCheck
methods.description: Performs a health check depending on the current mode, verifies backend connectivity if in 'backend' mode.

methods.name: export async function apiListNotes(mode: AppMode, query: NotesQuery): Promise<Note[]> { apiListNotes
methods.description: Lists notes based on the selected mode, either locally or via backend API.

methods.name: export async function apiCreateNote(mode: AppMode, input: NoteCreateInput): Promise<Note> { apiCreateNote
methods.description: Creates a new note using either local storage or backend API depending on the mode.

methods.name: export async function apiUpdateNote(mode: AppMode, noteId: NoteId, patch: NoteUpdateInput): Prom/ apiUpdateNote
methods.description: Updates an existing note identified by noteId with the given patch, via local storage or backend API.

methods.name: export async function apiDeleteNote(mode: AppMode, noteId: NoteId): Promise<boolean> { apiDeleteNote
methods.description: Deletes a note by noteId, either locally or through backend API, returning success status.

methods.name: export async function apiListAllTags(mode: AppMode): Promise<string[]> { apiListAllTags
methods.description: Lists all tags, currently from local storage; backend support is planned.

methods.name: export function apiGetSyncQueue(): SyncOperation[] { apiGetSyncQueue
methods.description: Returns the current local synchronization queue for offline-first operations.

methods.name: export function apiClearSyncQueue(opIds?: string[]): void { apiClearSyncQueue
methods.description: Clears entries from the local sync queue, optionally filtered by operation IDs.

ctags.name: apiCreateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiCreateNote(mode: AppMode, input: NoteCreateInput): Promise<Note> {$/

ctags.name: apiDeleteNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiDeleteNote(mode: AppMode, noteId: NoteId): Promise<boolean> {$/

ctags.name: apiHealthCheck
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiHealthCheck(mode: AppMode): Promise<{ ok: boolean; message?: string }> /

ctags.name: apiListNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiListNotes(mode: AppMode, query: NotesQuery): Promise<Note[]> {$/

ctags.name: apiUpdateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiUpdateNote(mode: AppMode, noteId: NoteId, patch: NoteUpdateInput): Prom/
